behavior_in_task_description.reason: All file paths and key strings (OnPush, Eager, default, optional) are listed in instruction.md; test checks map to described behaviors.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what's broken (OnPush described as manual, Eager as default) without prescribing exact replacement text.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for presence of keywords like 'default' near OnPush and 'optional' near Eager, and absence of instructions to set OnPush — allows multiple valid phrasings.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: All substantive checks are text grep/regex on markdown and JSDoc content (e.g., 'OnPush is enabled by default' substring checks); no code execution of behavior since this is a docs task.

test_not_tautological.reason: Stub implementations cannot pass; tests require specific textual updates like 'NOTE: OnPush is enabled by default' and removal of OnPush instructions.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Each of the 4 expected behaviors in instruction.md is covered by corresponding assertions in test_outputs.py.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with comment headers (Gates, pass_to_pass) and have descriptive names.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task produces documentation updates, not structured data.

no_typos.reason: File paths and identifiers appear correct and consistent between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names affected files but localization within each file is part of the task; doesn't give exact line/replacement.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Gold patch modifies agent config files (airules.md, guidelines.md, angular-20.mdc) with localized edits removing OnPush rules, not full rewrites.
